intended_use_full: Overjet Image Enhancement Assist is an image processing software that can be used for image enhancement in dental radiographs viewed in the Overjet device platform. It is an optional tool to be used for image quality enhancement. The software improves image quality by: - Reducing Noise: Utilizing a learning-based algorithm for noise reduction in bitewing and periapical images. - Enhancing Contrast and Sharpness: Applying standard, non-learning based techniques to enhance contrast and sharpness for bitewing, periapical, and panoramic images.
other_metrics: Contrast-to-noise ratio (CNR) and peak-signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) reported in quantification study; Likert expert clinical evaluation performed
